description: Goal/Assumptions/Smallest safe change/Verification discipline exists and is explicit
Repo rules explicitly reject speculative abstractions and future-proofing
Rules explicitly constrain scope and forbid drive-by edits
Rules define concrete completion checks by task type
Read order identifies manifests, tests, CI, and smallest owner path
Examples teach good vs bad behavior
Reusable skills exist for the main flows
Real source roots and ownership are discoverable in the repo
Tests exist near the behavior and can verify bug fixes/features
CI/lint/build surfaces exist and can be used as verification
Scripts or commands make before/after verification repeatable
Audit/report artifacts can be generated and saved consistently
